title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AirAsia Cargo India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AirAsia Cargo India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the AirAsia Cargo India family as a Distribution Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AirAsia Cargo India:
AirAsia Cargo India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia Cargo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
